institution.name: Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology fell 61% between 2011 and 2014 (53.5% → 21.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.1k vs 2.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology rose 376% between 2015 and 2018 (1.1% → 5.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma State University Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
